title: Polo Sport Rugby '93
desc: Heavyweight rugby from the golden Polo Sport era. Made in USA, thick cotton, contrast collar. Honest wear that only adds character.

title: Polo RL Navy Classic
desc: The staple. 90s navy classic-fit polo, embroidered pony, zero flaws. The one you wear every week.

title: Polo Country Chambray
desc: Polo Country — short-lived line, heavily hunted. Chambray fade is even, tag is intact. Collector piece.

title: Polo Bear Knit
desc: The grail. Knitted-in bear, not printed. Heavy cotton knit, deep navy. These don't come back.

title: RL '67 Faded Red
desc: Sun-faded red that looks intentional. Soft collar, broken-in feel. Vintage done right.

title: Polo Sport USA Flag
desc: Flag chest hit in clean white. Iconic 90s Polo Sport energy. Gone — back on the road.
